calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mei Hom, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Albert Purviance, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc.
Default entered against defendant on December 20, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed on June 4, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at Default Prove-Up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Albert Purviance, and against the Defaulted Defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Co, Inc. as follows:

Accrued Interest - $12.94.
Costs $200.00, for a total of $212.94.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
